title: stelis aspergilliformis
intro: Stelis aspergilliformis, also known as the fungus orchid, is a type of orchid that obtains its nutrients by parasitizing fungi in the surrounding soil. The medicinal properties of Stelis aspergilliformis include its potential to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Stelis aspergilliformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
